---
name: Bug / regression
about: A reproducible defect. Defects skip the approval gate — they flow straight to the Build/Operations Manager.
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "generated"]
---

<!-- Add `regression` if it worked before and is now broken (high priority). Add `operations`
     instead if it's genuinely a bot-health / deploy / publish issue. See AGENT-TEAM/WORKFLOW.md. -->

## What's wrong
<The defect, in one or two sentences.>

## Repro
<Exact steps / the message + Oliver's response / the surface (Discord vs. email).>

## Expected vs. actual
<What should happen, and what happens instead.>

## Evidence
<Logs, corpus facts, tool trace, issue/message IDs.>
